from typing import Union


def process_request(request):
    if request.is_json:
        return {"status": "ok"}
    elif request.is_file:
        return b"file content"
    elif request.is_error:
        return 500
    elif request.is_redirect:
        return "https://example.com"
    else:
        return None


def fetch_resource(resource_id: str) -> Union[dict, list, str, bytes, int, None]:
    resource = db.get(resource_id)
    if resource is None:
        return None
    if resource.type == "json":
        return resource.data
    if resource.type == "list":
        return resource.items
    if resource.type == "text":
        return resource.content
    if resource.type == "binary":
        return resource.bytes
    return resource.status_code


def transform_value(value):
    if isinstance(value, str):
        return int(value)
    elif isinstance(value, int):
        return str(value)
    elif isinstance(value, list):
        return tuple(value)
    elif isinstance(value, dict):
        return list(value.keys())
    return value
